description_long: This is a two-seater Chesterfield-style sofa upholstered in a light, off-white fabric. The front and inner sides of the arms and backrest feature deep button tufting, giving it a classic, luxurious appearance. Two large, loose seat cushions and two decorative throw pillows with a blue damask pattern provide comfort and visual contrast. The armrests are rolled and padded, matching the height of the backrest, and the sofa stands on four short, turned wooden legs. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, with smooth upholstery. The overall design is elegant and inviting, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings such as parks or patios.
description: Elegant, tufted two-seater sofa with rolled arms, light upholstery, and decorative pillows, standing on short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted backrest, rolled arms, two seat cushions, and two patterned throw pillows.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the sofa, the rolled armrest, and the tufted detailing along the inner side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back panel and the four wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the plain outer armrest and the sofa's overall silhouette.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two loose, patterned throw pillows; backrest is fully tufted with no separate back cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, featuring deep button tufting on the inner side and smooth upholstery on the outer side.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, turned wooden legs positioned at the corners, dark brown in color, slightly exposed beneath the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with deep button tufting, matching the armrest height and forming a unified, curved profile.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid off-white fabric with deep button tufting on the backrest and arms; throw pillows have a blue damask pattern.
